body_txt: The princess to be rescued , or the Prince Charming to sweep the heroine off her feet. Or just someone that happens to become romantically involved. It's a Super-Trope so universal, that there are too many specific examples to list. There are a few in the list below. Compare Attraction Tropes , Flirting and Courtship , Dating Tropes , Marriage Tropes , Index of Romantic Couples . Contrast Celibate Hero , who is immune to this. More innocent Sister Trope to Lust Object .
